_comment: Flight config. Copy to ~/.fleet/flights.json and set REAL values. A flight = a bounded activation: `flight.mjs open <agent>` runs `launch` (bring the runtime up) then signed-attach (takeoff → presence live); `flight.mjs close <agent>` runs configured `teardown` then signed-detach (runtime down → presence offline). STERILE: base_url + tenant required. `launch` must be non-blocking (start the runtime detached and return, e.g. `tmux new-session -d`), not the long-running agent process itself.
